items.title: i don't think this is a needle mover, but it could make sense for the nuggets to acquire nikola topic. they can give the thunder a second-round pick and then fit him into their trade exception. okc gets to cut its tax bill. denver gets young backup pg. serbian connection exists.
items.author: Michael Pina
items.body_excerpt: i don't think this is a needle mover, but it could make sense for the nuggets to acquire nikola topic. they can give the thunder a second-round pick and then fit him into their trade exception. okc gets to cut its tax bill. denver gets young backup pg. serbian connection exists. win-win!

items.title: Sam Presti on what Nikola Topić went through, and the way Topić handled it: "I'm very proud of him. I think he is going to have just a... like monster summer."
items.author: MrBuckBuck
items.body_excerpt: It sounds like Presti also went into tears, telling what it was like going through this with Topic.
